case_title: IRIS ZHANG VS. TEH HSUANG LEE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHANG, IRIS AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, TEH HSUANG DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-10-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-08-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-12-2002
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHANG, IRIS SERVED JAN-24-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, TEH HSUANG
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, TEH HSUANG
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUN-24-2002. MAY-10-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR SCOTT HOWARD WECHSLER APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUN-24-2002 THROUGH SEP-22-2002.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-15-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE. THE OCT-15-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
LETTER FROM SCOTT WECHSLER DATED 6/28/02 DECLINING TO SERVE AS ARBITRATOR
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUL-18-2002.
ARBITRATOR ROBERT E. DRYDEN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-23-2002 THROUGH OCT-21-2002.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-19-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE. THE NOV-19-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE AUG-22-2002.
ARBITRATOR MICHAEL J. COFFINO APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-23-2002 THROUGH NOV-21-2002.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-17-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
